ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "provincial_status" TEXT /* Provincial conservation status */,
  "bc_list" TEXT /* BC list status */,
  "cosewic_designation" TEXT /* COSEWIC designation */,
  "sara_designation" TEXT /* SARA designation */,
  "iucn_status" TEXT /* IUCN conservation status */,
  "species_description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for the species image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_cosewic_designation FOREIGN KEY ("cosewic_designation") REFERENCES legal_designations ("designation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_provincial_status FOREIGN KEY ("provincial_status") REFERENCES conservation_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_sara_designation FOREIGN KEY ("sara_designation") REFERENCES legal_designations ("designation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Regulatory body overseeing conservation */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the regulatory body */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL for the regulatory body */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the conservation status (e.g., endangered, threatened) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conservation status */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for the conservation status (e.g., red, yellow, green) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legal_designations" (
  "designation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legal designation */,
  "designation_name" TEXT /* Name of the designation (e.g., COSEWIC, SARA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the designation */,
  "legislation" TEXT /* Legislation related to the designation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species being observed */,
  "date_observed" TEXT /* Date when the observation was made */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the observation */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observer */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes regarding the observation */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the observation location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the observation location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES observers ("observer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observers" (
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observer */,
  "observer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the observer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the observer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the observer (e.g., researcher, volunteer) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the observer belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitats" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat */,
  "habitat_name" TEXT /* Name of the habitat type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the habitat */,
  "area_size" REAL /* Size of the habitat in hectares */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat (e.g., terrestrial, aquatic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_habitats" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the habitat */,
  "habitat_prevalence" REAL /* Prevalence of the species in the habitat (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id", "habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_status_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species being updated */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* New conservation status ID */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the status update */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status update */,
  "update_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_status_updates_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_status_updates_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES conservation_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the conservation project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_lead" TEXT /* Name of the project lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_species" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conservation project */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species associated with the project */,
  "project_impact" REAL /* Impact of the project on the species (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission_level" INTEGER /* Permission level of the role (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organization_members" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization associated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "organization_id")
)
